figures.caption: Figure 1: Causal tracing consists of three runs: i) a clean run for the correct object; ii) a corrupted run, where the subject span are corrupted to obtain a low-probability object prediction; and iii) a corrupted-with-restoration run, which restores the corrupted hidden representations at selected layers to their clean values, evaluating the contribution of those layers via changes in object probability.
Table 1: Editing performance across modalities and strategies.
